title: allium sultaniae-ismailii
intro: Allium sultaniae-ismailii, also known as the Ismail's Persian shallot, is a species of flowering plant in the onion family (Allium) that is native to Iran. The medicinal properties of Allium sultaniae-ismailii include its antibacterial, antifungal, and antiviral properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Allium sultaniae-ismailii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Allium sultaniae-ismailii can be prepared as an herbal supplement or used in cooking, with its bulbs being commonly used in traditional medicine and as a flavoring agent in Middle Eastern cuisine.
